title: Bio-Regeneration doubles attack damage

card.rawText: Can only be equipped to a creature with 9 or less remaining HP. Heal 30 HP. 2x Hit Roll results for this creature. 2x Atk Damage for this creature.

plan.title: Bio-Regeneration doubles attack damage
plan.summary: Equip Bio-Regeneration to a modifier-zero creature and verify its deterministic attack damage is doubled.

notes: Set player_1 primary current hp to 5 so Bio-Regeneration can be equipped.
Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the deterministic damage roll is easy to inspect.

steps: Equip Bio-Regeneration to player_1 primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect damage dealt to player_2 primary creature.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage is doubled from 2 to 4

manualVerification: Confirm 009-E03 separately doubles Hit Roll results.
riskNotes: The focused route showed the deterministic damage roll resolves as 2 before the 2x multiplier, for 4 total damage.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
